title: Celestial Horizons Resourcepack
description: A resourcepack designed to add variety to vanilla blocks and entities. This pack requires optifine/ETF,EMF & continuity. Best suited for use in conjunction of my "Celestial Horizons" datapack
body:
A resourcepack designed to add variety to vanilla blocks and entities,with random block variation, foliage additions, and entity variety mostly focused on IRL animals 

**This pack requires optifine/ETF,EMF & continuity.**

Best suited for use in conjunction of my "Celestial Horizons" datapack
# Information
There are 2 versions of the pack, LITE is designed specifically for my map "Lands of Mythria" but can be used in other worlds. _**LITE version only affects pink petals and adds fire colors to Celestial Horizons datapack biomes**_

Full version of the pack however, is **_still in  development_** , But will include block variations, alterations, more foliage, and entity variation.

### Celestial Horizons datapack page
If you want to use both RP and DP together check out the DP here:[https://modrinth.com/datapack/celestial-horizons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/celestial-horizons)
